description: Legal document in Hebrew. Location: Jerusalem. Dated: middle decade of Tammuz 5417 AM = June/July 1657 CE. Concerning a disputed inheritance. Yaʿaqov Esperiel (אישפריל) made a statement before the court detailing how Bella (בילייא), the wife of Yiṣḥaq ʿOvadya, kept back some of the inheritance from her late sister Oro (אורו), widow of Shelomo Pesante (פיזאנטי), which had been left to the orphan Yeʾuda (יאודה). Words have been deleted and additions made between the lines and in the left-hand margin. (Information from CUDL and A. David's edition via FGP.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
